summary: Full-depth read of the Met Collection API reference; recorded design facts in RESEARCH_LOG.md and a leading-candidate decision (long-tail explorer over Met CC0 metadata) with concrete sketch and pivot condition in DECISIONS.md. Acquisition insight: MetObjects.csv is hosted on github.com, inside the runner's egress allowlist.
environment_note: Live API endpoints (collectionapi.metmuseum.org) unreachable from both the runner (github-only egress) and assistant fetch tooling (provenance-gated); docs page itself was fully readable. Bulk-file-over-github is the promising acquisition route; MetObjects.csv may be git-LFS-hosted (media.githubusercontent.com), to be tested in Run 5.
next: Run 5 (must be non-documentation): test acquisition of MetObjects.csv head from github.com in the runner; build met_sample extractor if reachable, else build query CLI over a schema-faithful fixture.
